diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -86,7 +86,6 @@
         c0 = self.init_c(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size).contiguous()

         hidden = (h0, c0)

         if targets is not None:

-            # Teacher forcing with proper shift: targets = [sos, t1, ..., eos], use [sos, t1, ..., tn] to predict [t1, ..., eos]

             decoder_inputs = targets[:, :-1]

             embeds = self.embedding(decoder_inputs)

             outputs = []

@@ -104,7 +103,7 @@
     def generate(self, features, max_len=200):

         batch_size = features.size(0)

         device = features.device

-        inputs = torch.full((batch_size, 1), 1, dtype=torch.long, device=device)  # <sos>

+        inputs = torch.full((batch_size, 1), 1, dtype=torch.long, device=device)  # <sos>=1

         mean_features = features.mean(dim=1)

         h0 = self.init_h(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size).contiguous()

         c0 = self.init_c(mean_features).view(self.num_layers, batch_size, self.hidden_size).contiguous()

@@ -119,13 +118,12 @@
             out = self.fc(self.dropout(lstm_out.squeeze(1)))

             pred = out.argmax(dim=1)

             inputs = pred.unsqueeze(1)

-            for i in range(batch_size):

+            for i, p in enumerate(pred.tolist()):

                 if not finished[i]:

-                    token_id = pred[i].item()

-                    if token_id == 2:  # <eos>

+                    if p == 2:  # <eos>

                         finished[i] = True

                     else:

-                        sequences[i].append(token_id)

+                        sequences[i].append(p)

             if all(finished):

                 break

         return sequences

@@ -138,8 +136,7 @@
 

     def forward(self, images, targets=None):

         features = self.encoder(images)

-        outputs = self.decoder(features, targets)

-        return outputs

+        return self.decoder(features, targets)

 

     def generate(self, images, max_len=200):

         features = self.encoder(images)

--- a/train.py

     criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(ignore_index=0, label_smoothing=0.1)

+            state_dict = torch.load('checkpoints/best.pt', map_location=device, weights_only=True)

+            model.load_state_dict(state_dict, strict=True)

+            logging.warning(f"Could not load best.pt: {e}")

     for epoch in range(num_epochs):
